evidence_excerpt: Index patient V-8 remained seizure-free after treatment and even after stopping medication at age 4, but had isolated speech retardation and a sleep EEG with brief generalized spike–wave and left parietal spikes.

quality_of_life.evidence_excerpt: He has remained seizure free up to now, although the medication had been stopped at age 4 years.

timeline_events.evidence_excerpt: He was successfully treated with phenobarbital.
He has remained seizure free up to now, although the medication had been stopped at age 4 years.

notes_on_uncertainty: The record does not specify a formal diagnosis date; the hospital admission when phenobarbital was initiated is used as the index time. Exact dates are not provided; long-term refers to >12 months after this admission. EEG abnormalities without clinical seizures were not treated as deterioration.
